title: Nursery Rhyme. XLVII. Tales.
content:
Punch and Judy,
            Fought for a pie,
        Punch gave Judy
            A sad blow on the eye.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. XLVII. Tales.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
